mapper.select: SELECT ct.class_id, ct.class_name, ct.class_begin, ct.class_duration AS class_time, e.employee_name AS coach, ct.class_level AS classLevel, ct.class_duration AS classDuration, ct.max_capacity AS maxCapacity, ct.class_description AS classDescription, ct.price, COUNT(cr.record_id) AS enrolledCount, CASE WHEN ct.max_capacity IS NULL OR ct.max_capacity = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(COUNT(cr.record_id) * 100.0 / NULLIF(ct.max_capacity, 0), 1) END AS capacityUsage FROM class_table ct LEFT JOIN employee e ON ct.coach_id = e.employee_id LEFT JOIN class_record cr ON ct.class_id = cr.class_id GROUP BY ct.class_id, ct.class_name, ct.class_begin, ct.class_duration, e.employee_name, ct.class_level, ct.max_capacity, ct.class_description, ct.price ORDER BY ct.class_begin ASC, ct.class_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO class_table (class_id, class_name, class_begin, class_duration, class_level, coach_id, max_capacity, class_description, price) VALUES (#{classId}, #{className}, #{classBegin}, #{classDuration}, #{classLevel}, #{coachId}, #{maxCapacity}, #{classDescription}, #{price})
mapper.select: SELECT ct.class_id, ct.class_name, ct.class_begin, ct.class_duration AS class_time, e.employee_name AS coach, ct.class_level AS classLevel, ct.class_duration AS classDuration, ct.max_capacity AS maxCapacity, ct.class_description AS classDescription, ct.price FROM class_table ct LEFT JOIN employee e ON ct.coach_id = e.employee_id WHERE ct.class_id = #{classId}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ct.class_id) AS courseTotal, COUNT(cr.record_id) AS registrationTotal, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(cr.rating), 0), 1) AS averageRating, SUM(CASE WHEN cr.record_id IS NOT NULL AND cr.rating IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unratedTotal FROM class_table ct LEFT JOIN class_record cr ON ct.class_id = cr.class_id

SELECT ct.class_id AS classId, ct.class_name AS className, e.employee_name AS coach, COUNT(cr.record_id) AS enrolledCount, ct.max_capacity AS maxCapacity, CASE WHEN ct.max_capacity IS NULL OR ct.max_capacity = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(COUNT(cr.record_id) * 100.0 / NULLIF(ct.max_capacity, 0), 1) END AS capacityUsage, ROUND(AVG(cr.rating), 1) AS averageRating, SUM(CASE WHEN cr.record_id IS NOT NULL AND cr.rating IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unratedCount FROM class_table ct LEFT JOIN class_record cr ON ct.class_id = cr.class_id LEFT JOIN employee e ON ct.coach_id = e.employee_id GROUP BY ct.class_id, ct.class_name, e.employee_name, ct.max_capacity ORDER BY enrolledCount DESC, capacityUsage DESC, ct.class_id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT ct.class_id AS classId, ct.class_name AS className, e.employee_name AS coach, COUNT(cr.record_id) AS enrolledCount, ROUND(AVG(cr.rating), 1) AS averageRating FROM class_table ct LEFT JOIN class_record cr ON ct.class_id = cr.class_id LEFT JOIN employee e ON ct.coach_id = e.employee_id WHERE cr.rating IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ct.class_id, ct.class_name, e.employee_name ORDER BY AVG(cr.rating) DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT ct.class_id AS classId, ct.class_name AS className, e.employee_name AS coach, COUNT(cr.record_id) AS enrolledCount, ROUND(AVG(cr.rating), 1) AS averageRating FROM class_table ct LEFT JOIN class_record cr ON ct.class_id = cr.class_id LEFT JOIN employee e ON ct.coach_id = e.employee_id GROUP BY ct.class_id, ct.class_name, e.employee_name ORDER BY COUNT(cr.record_id) DESC LIMIT 8
